recentTweets.text:
Donald Trump tried to turn America’s 250th anniversary into his own personal birthday party on the National Mall. 

Turns out, Americans aren’t interested in celebrating Donald Trump or his failed vanity projects.

Donald Trump is building a golden ballroom for him and his buddies to have parties. 

Meanwhile, American families are facing skyrocketing health care premiums and rising grocery costs. https://t.co/CfgrK5uWZa

Fairfax Democrats delivered record margins to elect Abigail Spanberger and the Democratic ticket this year. 

@MarkWarnerVA and I joined @sullydems and @dranesvilledems to thank their volunteers and gear up for 2026. https://t.co/TFEXo7EdBv

House Republicans created a health care crisis they now refuse to address. Now Virginians are seeing their premiums skyrocket. 

Republicans in Virginia saw the consequences at the ballot box last Tuesday. They’ll see it again next year if they don’t work with us to fix it. https://t.co/KwqJ01gkFH

Trump’s ego wants a stadium with his name on it. Millions are going hungry. Federal workers aren’t getting paid.

This is what he’s worried about during the longest shutdown in U.S. history?

The late Gerry Connolly said it best, a federal prison might be a better fit. https://t.co/br61POUVgU

Also a backlash to @GlennYoungkin craven decision to cheerlead as Virginians lost their jobs by the thousands. 

I’ve never seen anything like it, and it will define his term as Governor.
Congratulations to the next Governor of the Commonwealth of Virginia, @SpanbergerForVA!
🚨POLLS CLOSE IN 2 HOURS🚨 Virginia, get out and vote before 7 PM! https://t.co/Rb4NygxUrZ

I visited food banks across Fairfax yesterday to see firsthand the devastating effects of the Trump Republican shutdown and his decision to cut off SNAP benefits.

Donald Trump needs to be the dealmaker he played on TV and negotiate an end to the shutdown. https://t.co/G1qgNFFSMs

Yvette and I just cast our ballots!

Polls close at 7 PM. Get out and vote, Virginia! https://t.co/3k5LjohxId

Sen. Kelly should be Adelita Grijalva’s constituent, but Speaker Johnson won’t swear her in because she’ll be the final signature to force a vote to release the Epstein files. 

Not only has he not sworn her in, he’s given House Republicans a seven week vacation in the meantime. https://t.co/QzfLHBA9Ny

We’re turning out in record numbers because we understand the stakes of this election. 

I was honored to stand with @GabbyGiffords and @CaptMarkKelly today to knock on doors and get out the vote for Democrats this Election Day. https://t.co/enYQI4Lg41

I’ve been criss-crossing Northern Virginia to get out the vote for tomorrow’s election and it’s clear that voters want change. 

VA Republicans like @WinsomeSears have bent the knee to Trump while he ravages our economy. It’s time for leaders with the courage to take him on. https://t.co/FBBJGfyXsu

I graduated from high school in dark red Prince William Co. Thanks to leaders like @MarkWarnerVA we’ve flipped it into a Democratic stronghold.

On Tuesday when we elect @guzman4virginia and re-elect @VA_JET we will deliver an all blue PWC delegation and send a powerful message. https://t.co/iAgtsw5C8F
Another weekend full of conversations and community in VA-11! Together, we’re showing up and fighting for a brighter future. https://t.co/O63lQaM7LT

Trump’s pardoning of the violent January 6th insurrectionists is yet another example of his soft on crime approach that makes our country less safe. 

Grateful to law enforcement for apprehending this criminal (again).

Final stop for the day was the @arlingtondems annual Golden Gala.

We are going to turn out every Democrat around the state to elect our statewide ticket and expand our majority in the House of Delegates. https://t.co/LOSFHkAYsg

The seeds of the American Revolution were sown right here in Fairfax. Our founders, including George Washington and George Mason, said no to a king. 

Today, thousands of us are coming together to say loud and clear: No Kings. https://t.co/cZs0Rul9nn

Today, I joined advocates, survivors, and community members for the Brady Vigil at NRA Headquarters to honor the lives lost to gun violence, and to continue my commitment to ending this epidemic. 

Every life lost is a reminder of why we keep fighting for common sense gun laws. https://t.co/0Oa9wiyZaw
Trump and Vought are “punishing” Democrats by cutting opioid addiction treatment and prevention that is most desperately needed in rural communities.

A little candy, a lot of smiles, and tons of Herndon pride! 

Thanks to everyone who brought the energy and spirit to this year’s Herndon Homecoming Parade. https://t.co/2CVIxuqhaF

Whether you’re a fired federal worker, a family facing skyrocketing health care costs, or a gay Virginian facing discrimination, it was clear tonight @SpanbergerForVA is the only candidate who will stand up for all Virginians as Governor.

Congressional Republicans are on Day 7 of a paid vacation, and Trump is suggesting that some furloughed employees don’t deserve the paychecks that they are legally entitled to. 

This is disgraceful and illegal. Trump doesn’t get to pick and choose who the law applies to.

Congratulations to ⁦@RachnaHeizer⁩ on earning the Democratic nomination in Braddock tonight! 

She will be a fantastic member of the Board of Supervisors and I’m all in to ensure she wins resoundingly on Dec. 9. https://t.co/bJrGDmBDJC
If Russ Vought has time to meet with House Republicans, he can find the time to testify under oath about his illegal scheme to mass fire federal employees.

As I pointed out after our special election in Virginia, Speaker Johnson swore in two Republicans the day after their special election wins (in pro forma sessions).

Rep-Elect Grijalva should be treated the same. She should be sworn in immediately. 

#ReleaseAllTheEpsteinFiles

Great to welcome American hero Michael Fanone to our @FairfaxCityDem fundraiser.

We must never forget the courage he and other police officers demonstrated on January 6, 2021. https://t.co/vemKqoyTGi

Republicans control Congress—they have the power to prevent a government shutdown. 

I’m ready to negotiate for my constituents, but Republicans are following Trump’s orders to “not deal with Democrats.” https://t.co/6xqolADq7G

Kicked off early voting today with @SpanbergerForVA and @SenatorHashmi.

Last week Fairfax sent an overwhelming message to Donald Trump and we are going to do it again in November.

Find your early vote site and make your plan to vote: https://t.co/Yz81PVVC5m. https://t.co/8fbQI55PwB

The Chairman of the FCC, Brendan Carr, bullied ABC into cancelling Jimmy Kimmel. 

Censorship is un-American and an attack on freedom speech, the foundation of our democracy. 

The FCC Chairman must resign and the Trump Administration’s efforts to stifle free speech must end. https://t.co/TvK5dxJtmt
Virginia GOP just can’t seem to quit DOGE.

As I’ve been saying, everyone knows someone who has lost their job due to Trump policies. 

And yet, @winwithwinsome continues to prioritize partisan politics over Virginia jobs.

My first few days in Congress have been jam-packed! 

✅ Introduced my 1st bill to protect federal workers from unjust DOGE cuts.
✅ Signed the Epstein discharge petition.
✅ Gave my 1st floor speech calling out Trump’s harmful policies.

It’s an honor to serve Fairfax families. https://t.co/OB7lV0QQiB
Thank you for the warm welcome!

Fairfax families are already facing ACA hikes & Medicaid cuts from Trump’s policies. Now he’s pushing toward a shutdown and blocking good-faith negotiations. 

I’ll keep fighting for solutions that protect families & lower health care costs. https://t.co/X40nvTvCYM

Health care premiums are set to skyrocket.

Democrats are ready and willing to negotiate a bipartisan agreement to help American families keep their coverage. 

But Trump’s Republicans seem hellbent on a shutdown plus higher health care costs.  https://t.co/Asdwc9PEdF

Grateful to be elected as Fairfax’s fighter in Congress. On day one, I hit the ground running to protect federal workers, stop Trump’s dangerous agenda, and deliver for families.

Follow @Rep_Walkinshaw to stay connected to the work ahead. https://t.co/gOdyWVmlAI

Northern Virginia is on the leading edge of the Trump economy, where everyone knows someone who has lost their job b/c of Trump policies. 

If we don’t charge course, the same will be true across the country soon.  https://t.co/P6wRfQexry

On 9/11/2001, I was a freshman at NYU. 

I'll never forget the sound of the planes crashing, the smell of smoke, and the courage of the first responders. Today, let's remember and honor the lives lost on that terrible day. https://t.co/ZhPlkCC47w
THANK YOU FOR YOUR ATTenTION TO THiS MATTER!!!!!!!! https://t.co/bXdNRfPNtL

Every day I hear from folks in federal agencies who describe the open partisanship, politicization, and loyalty (to Trump) tests that are now the norm. 

Federal agencies, including the FBI, exist to serve the American people, not Trump’s ego.  https://t.co/6EQYzl09Oq

Honored to be sworn in today to represent VA-11 in Congress. Fairfax families will always come first. 

Grateful to my wife Yvette and our son Mateo for their love and support every step of the way. https://t.co/7MkZY5Xz3R

I’m disgusted and horrified to see the news that Charlie Kirk has been shot in Utah. 

Political violence has no place in our nation and should be universally condemned. My thoughts are with him and his family.

As I promised, I arrived at the U.S. Capitol at  9:00 am. My hope is that Speaker Johnson follows the precedent he set and that I’m sworn in right away to begin serving Fairfax families in Congress. https://t.co/xr1fo2anan

I am humbled by the confidence that Fairfax voters have placed in me. On Day One, I am ready to stand up for Fairfax.

From taking on DOGE to defending our democracy, I will fight every single day to deliver results for the people of the 11th District.

Read my full statement ⬇️ https://t.co/BFmgPy6pA1

Strong turnout so far, but there’s still time to make your voice heard! 

If you haven’t voted yet, head to your polling place before 7:00 pm—it’s almost last call. 

Don’t miss your chance to shape Fairfax’s future! 

Learn more: https://t.co/o49q6iThAz https://t.co/fwGf2hTqWt

At the polls this morning with Gerry’s wife Smitty & daughter Caitlin, I heard voters share how he touched their lives throughout his service. His legacy lives on in Fairfax.

If elected today, I’ll continue his work fighting for our values. Make your voice heard before 7 pm! https://t.co/IWLdDOZRap

Today is Election Day! I want to go to Congress to be your ally, but I need your help. Polls are open from 6:00 am to 7:00 pm — make your voice heard and remind a friend to vote! 

Find everything you need here: https://t.co/o49q6iThAz https://t.co/e5dhuhBh6c

Proud to welcome House Democratic Chair @PeteAguilar & @SenatorHashmi at our Sunday GOTV rally, alongside @DonBeyerVA & @YVindman. 

It means the world that union members, @MomsDemand & residents are knocking every door possible before Sept 9. 

Let’s finish strong, Fairfax. https://t.co/Mb8zIGjly5

What a day! 250+ grassroots supporters and elected officials joined our GOTV rally with @SpanbergerForVA. 

Fairfax is united, & we’re sending Trump & my MAGA opponent a clear message: our community rejects their reckless agenda. https://t.co/uNM7m1qlzo

Early voting is happening TODAY, tomorrow, and Saturday across VA-11!  I want to be your ally in Congress, but I need your voice in this fight against Trump’s dangerous agenda. 

Let’s get out the vote, Fairfax! 

Make your plan at https://t.co/WEokXcfmSh https://t.co/Ckhb1jFOwy

We cannot ignore the calls from these survivors. If elected, I will sign the Epstein Files discharge petition to force a vote on releasing the files. 

Will you, @stew_whitson?

Today was all about our incredible supporters. Thank you for spending your day with @SpanbergerForVA and me, knocking doors and talking with neighbors. 

Our campaign runs on your energy!

What a fantastic Sunday with Abigail Spanberger and our incredible supporters knocking doors across VA-11. 

We’ll carry this energy through Sept. 9 and on to November to elect @SpanbergerForVA! 

Make sure to vote early! https://t.co/BnjtpnFi0t https://t.co/9I9UmXwqP1

Thrilled to welcome @SpanbergerForVA to our canvass launch tomorrow at 11:30am! With just 10 days until the VA-11 Special Election on Sept. 9, every conversation with our neighbors matters more than ever.

Sign up: https://t.co/BbmOHuIBLo https://t.co/npV7jxZCHg

Great night yesterday with the Spanberger for Governor Grassroots Coalition! Fairfax is energized to finish strong on Sept. 9 in VA-11 and to carry that momentum forward to elect @SpanbergerForVA in November. https://t.co/I7sQNv5oSv

Trump’s and my opponent’s DOGE scheme has been debunked, again! 

Reports show DOGE is wasting billions and weakening government services. DOGE isn’t about cutting waste—it’s about stacking government with Trump loyalists like my opponent. https://t.co/XCanzwD7kw

Trump’s sending the Guard to DC—a city with its lowest crime rate in 30 years. But on Jan. 6, he refused to call them in as he incited a violent attack & stood by while insurrectionists stormed the Capitol. This isn’t about safety—it’s a distraction from his many failures. https://t.co/NHjhQOhAJI

Yesterday, my opponent said his “heart goes out” to the federal workers fired under Trump’s DOGE cuts. 

Yet on MAGA media, he brags: “The DOGE effort is just getting started.”

Federal workers don’t want your sympathy, @stew_whitson. They want someone who will fight for them. https://t.co/RbtmE6DHF9
https://t.co/3X8yGDvrTW

assessment.summary: The captured X archive has 3 Kurdistan Lens tweet hits for James R. Walkinshaw. The social-media posture reads as kurdistan-adjacent regional signal because the strongest matched frame is Iraq, Syria, PKK/YPG, or regional language rather than explicit KRG language. Top matched terms: Oil / Energy.
assessment.whatItWasLike: When this account mentioned the Kurdish file, the language most often clustered around Iraq, Syria, PKK/YPG, or regional language rather than explicit KRG language. I count 0 direct Kurdistan/Kurdish-region term hits, 0 security-frame hits, 0 supportive or diplomatic hits, 0 humanitarian/minority hits, and 3 energy/economic hits in the exported profile window. The latest matched tweet is dated 2025-10-12T17:47:23Z and should be opened before treating this as a final stance.
assessment.dominantFrame: Iraq, Syria, PKK/YPG, or regional language rather than explicit KRG language

Reports show DOGE is wasting billions and weakening government services. DOGE isn’t about cutting waste—it’s about stacking government with Trump loyalists like my opponent. https://t.co/XCanzwD7kw

Trump’s sending the Guard to DC—a city with its lowest crime rate in 30 years. But on Jan. 6, he refused to call them in as he incited a violent attack & stood by while insurrectionists stormed the Capitol. This isn’t about safety—it’s a distraction from his many failures. https://t.co/NHjhQOhAJI

Yesterday, my opponent said his “heart goes out” to the federal workers fired under Trump’s DOGE cuts. 

Yet on MAGA media, he brags: “The DOGE effort is just getting started.”

Federal workers don’t want your sympathy, @stew_whitson. They want someone who will fight for them. https://t.co/RbtmE6DHF9
https://t.co/3X8yGDvrTW

Today I held a roundtable with federal workers and contractors fired because of Trump’s DOGE cuts. The way these public servants have been treated is despicable. 

I honor their service and stand with them 100%. https://t.co/QpI8pHlJeR

Tonight’s debate made one thing clear: my opponent wants to be Trump’s ally in Congress, even if it means pushing policies that hurt the people of VA-11.

I’m running for Congress to deliver for you and your family, and to stop Trump’s dangerous agenda. https://t.co/j2zKa2kOxR

Thank you to @MarkWarner for leading this joint statement. I couldn’t agree more. This humanitarian crisis is unacceptable.

Trump must engage to press for a ceasefire that halts the violence, surges humanitarian aid into Gaza, and returns the hostages to their families.
